info.DAtuviSezaH: asya DAtoH vizaye sidDAntakOmudyAm ucyate -'ayaM na sArvatrikaH liwyanyatarasyAm ityAdeH GaslAdeSaviDAnAt  ... liNAdi-aBAvAd ASizi asya aprayogaH'  Gas-DAtoH ASIrliNlakAre evameva kutracit anyatrApi (yaTA liw-lakAre karmaRi prayoge ca) rUpARi na Bavanti iti asya ASayaH
info.english_meaning: to eatto devour to binge to overeat
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' ayaM na sArvatrikaH  ' liwyanyatarasyAm ' (2-4-40) ityadeH GaslAdeSaviDAnAt  tataSca  yatra liNgaM vacanaM vA asti  tatrEva asya prayogaH  atrEva pAWaH Sapi parasmEpade liNgam  lfditkaraRamaNi  aniwkArikAsu pAWo valAdyArDaDAtuke  kmaraci tu viSizyopAdAnam ' iti sidDAntakOmudI  kfdantarUpamAlAyAM vizayesmin anyAni api matAni darSitAni

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'viGaso BuktaSezaM tu' (manu0 3285) taTA cottare rAmacarite prayogaH--tfpyatkAlakarAlavaktraviGasavyAkIryamARA iva (BuvaH) (56)
